name: trivy options provided in the single config project to native CLI flags
command: f=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/emit-tool-config.sh" --tool trivy --options '{"severity":"CRITICAL,HIGH","ignore_unfixed":true}' --out . 2>/dev/null); printf '%s' "$f" | grep -q -- '--severity CRITICAL,HIGH' && printf '%s' "$f" | grep -q -- '--ignore-unfixed' && echo trivy-projects 1>&2
